provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 Major Course List publishes 34 unique course codes and titles under one broad Major Course List: 29 PSY courses and five Cross-Faculty Core rows. It marks PSY1030 for Year 1 Admission only and states that Cross-Faculty Core Components I, II and III are worth 1 credit point each, with one of three published Component III options chosen. The current Programme page confirms EdUHK Programme Code A4B075, JUPAS Code JS8651, and identifies PSY4038 Industrial Internship and PSY4074 Scientific Study in Psychology I: Research Internship as the two 3-cp Internship options. The public course list does not map the remaining PSY rows to the published Foundation and Core, Major Interdisciplinary, Major Elective or concentration domains, does not publish their individual credit points, and does not publish a recommended year/semester pattern. Those fields remain unknown, and the broad coded subset does not assert a graduation path or completion decision.
